articles.description: According to PANews, Ethena founder Guy Young clarified on the X platform that Ethena and Tether are not competitors but rather mutually beneficial entities. In a market where approximately 70% of perpetual contracts are denominated in USDT, each short position added by Ethena creates new demand for USDT.
